default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of the CMS (WordPress) for publishing blog posts and managing content on the Arena.im website.](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [WordPress is being used as the CMS, with the RankMath plugin for SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Categories are used to create topic clusters and structure URLs](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Featured images should be optimized for size and resolution](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [RankMath provides SEO analysis, meta data customization, and social preview options](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [AI content generation tools are available but need to be tested](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

## Topics

### WordPress Overview

  - [Posts vs Pages: Posts are for blog/dated content, Pages are for static website content](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Customer success cases are separated into their own custom post type](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Existing category structure needs improvement to align with topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### Post Editing

  - [Standard editor for text, images, formatting](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Elementor plugin available for more complex layouts if needed](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Post settings: status, visibility, author, categories, tags, featured image](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Categories form the URL path, should be carefully structured](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### SEO with RankMath

  - [Previews meta title, description, social sharing cards](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Analyzes content for focus keywords, readability, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Allows customizing schema markup](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Has AI content tools that need testing](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sadira to send Luis her email for CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Discuss category/topic cluster strategy with marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Test AI content generation tools in RankMath](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Sadira to follow up with any other questions as she starts using the CMS](https://fathom.video/share/M43L7brrfMbbMiXhymcEar6exxx424L2?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

action_items.description: Send list of required CMS access to Luís Eterovick (3) with Sadira Sittampalam and Jimmy's emails
Activate AI content creation tool and test its effectiveness
Follow up with Luís Eterovick (3) if any questions arise regarding CMS use
